U.S. Bank Foreign Exchange Contracts – Standing Settlement Instructions Please reference the following when sending wire transfers to U.S. Bank for the settlement of Foreign Exchange Contracts. Pacs.009 (formally MT202) payments made to U.S. Bank via SWIFT or Fed Wire should be made for the account of: U.S. Bank National Association, Foreign Exchange Settlements, Minneapolis, MN SWIFT USBKUS44FEX
